summary: Completed frontend testing of Pillar-Based Reports feature. All UI components and API integrations are working correctly. The Pillars tab in Reports section displays summary cards for all 5 pillars (Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care), totals bar with revenue/commission/bookings/profit metrics, and sub-tabs for detailed views (Summary, Celebrate, Dine, Stay). Period filter dropdown works correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (5 orders for Celebrate, 3 reservations for Dine)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pillar Reports feature is fully functional. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/reports/pillars/summary, /celebrate, /dine, /stay, /comparison. Frontend component: ReportsManager.jsx lines 518-776. The feature shows performance metrics broken down by pillar (Celebrate=products, Dine=restaurants, Stay=hotels). Travel and Care pillars show 'Coming Soon' status.

backend_api_tests.pillar_summary_endpoint: PASS - Returns all 5 pillars with metrics and totals
backend_api_tests.pillar_celebrate_endpoint: PASS - Returns revenue, orders, items_sold, gst_collected, top_products, city_breakdown
backend_api_tests.pillar_dine_endpoint: PASS - Returns reservations, buddy_visits, commission, top_restaurants
backend_api_tests.pillar_stay_endpoint: PASS - Returns coming_soon status with placeholder metrics

frontend_ui_tests.navigate_to_reports: PASS - Reports tab accessible from admin panel
frontend_ui_tests.pillars_tab_visible: PASS - 📊 Pillars tab visible in Reports section
frontend_ui_tests.pillar_summary_cards: PASS - 5 cards displayed (Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care)
frontend_ui_tests.stay_card_data: PASS - Shows 0 bookings, Coming Soon status
frontend_ui_tests.travel_care_cards: PASS - Both show Coming Soon status
frontend_ui_tests.totals_bar: PASS - Shows Total Revenue (₹3,224), Total Commission (₹1,500), Total Bookings (8), Est. Profit (₹3,112)
frontend_ui_tests.summary_sub_tab: PASS - Shows Profit by Pillar chart and Activity by Pillar section
frontend_ui_tests.celebrate_sub_tab: PASS - Shows Revenue, Orders, Items Sold, GST Collected metrics and Top Products list
frontend_ui_tests.dine_sub_tab: PASS - Shows Total Bookings, Reservations, Buddy Visits, Commission metrics and Top Restaurants table
frontend_ui_tests.stay_sub_tab: PASS - Shows Coming Soon placeholder with hotel icon
frontend_ui_tests.period_filter: PASS - Dropdown shows Today, This Week, This Month, This Quarter, Year to Date options
frontend_ui_tests.period_filter_change: PASS - Selecting different period triggers data refresh

pillar_summary_cards.description: 5 clickable cards showing key metrics for each pillar with icons

totals_bar.description: Gradient bar showing aggregated metrics across all pillars

summary_view.description: Profit by Pillar horizontal bar chart with percentages, Activity by Pillar list, Insights section

celebrate_report.description: 4 metric cards (Revenue, Orders, Items Sold, GST), Top Products list, Revenue by City section

dine_report.description: 4 metric cards (Bookings, Reservations, Buddy Visits, Commission), Top Restaurants table with columns

stay_report.description: Coming Soon placeholder with hotel icon and descriptive message

period_filter.description: Dropdown filter with 5 period options, triggers API refresh on change
